onboarding.title: No nodes to show yet
onboarding.intro: The knowledge graph is built from entities and relations extracted from each chapter. This book has no nodes yet — make sure processing has finished, or re-upload it.

modal.title: Timeline Structure Detected
modal.subtitle: Your book has been analysed. Choose which timeline modes to enable for the knowledge graph.

chapterMode.title: Reading-order mode
chapterMode.description: Slice the graph by chapter — see the world as you read through the book.

storyMode.title: Story-chronology mode
storyMode.description: Slice by story-world time order, derived from the temporal analysis. Requires Timeline Compute to run first.

entity.triggerFailed: Failed to trigger analysis. Please try again later.
entity.analysisDone: Deep analysis complete. Reload to view.
entity.noAnalysis: No deep analysis yet. This will consume tokens.

toolbar.shareFailed: Copy failed — please copy the URL manually
toolbar.exportUnavailable: PNG export isn't available in community view

communityScope.heading: Scope of this view
communityScope.explain: Clustering only counts positive relations between characters (e.g. alliance, family, friendship).
communityScope.otherEntities: {{n}} non-character/unclustered entities not shown in this view

popover.title: Run Relation Inference
popover.algoValue: Common Neighbors + Adamic-Adar (pure graph theory, not LLM)
popover.outputValue: Candidate inferred relations awaiting review — adopt or reject each

menu.safeRerunDesc: Only scores new entity pairs, keeps existing decisions
menu.forceRerunDesc: Clears all {{n}} adopted/rejected decisions — cannot be undone

review.title: Inferred review · {{n}}
review.banner: The following {{n}} are graph-theory inferred relations (not formal). Adopting promotes them to formal edges in the graph.
review.rerunForceConfirm: This resets every adopted / rejected decision back to pending. Relations already written to the graph remain, but they will reappear here for review. Continue?

compare.title: Compare
compare.noSuggested: No candidate inferences between them yet.

lens.title: Lens
lens.subtitle: Lens · Chapter {{n}} / {{total}}
lens.noTimeline: No timeline data available for this book yet.
lens.storyModeLocked: Story order isn't available yet — needs enough ranked events first
lens.timelineGlobalNote: Data-layer lens: applies to individual, type, and community views alike; faction grouping in community mode only counts characters who have appeared.
lens.epistemicIntro: See the world through one character's knowledge
lens.epistemicFallbackAll: Timeline is "All": perspective is computed against the book's final chapter, unaffected by chapter position.
lens.epistemicFallbackChapter: Bounded at chapter {{n}}: entities not yet introduced after chapter {{n}} are marked unknown from this character's perspective.
lens.epistemicDisabledTitle: Perspective only applies to the individual view
lens.epistemicDisabledDesc: Type / community views are aggregated — there's no single focal character to attach a perspective to. Your settings are kept; switching back to the individual view restores them automatically.
lens.misbeliefToggleDesc: Highlights misbelief-related event nodes with a warning color
lens.bookmarkAggregateNote: Aggregated view: clicking a bookmark switches back to the individual view and selects that entity.

orphan.description: Not connected to any relation in this book — collapsed here instead of floating next to the main graph.

pair.title: Relationship Evolution · {{a}} × {{b}}
pair.noNewThisChapter: No new shared neighbors this chapter.
pair.insufficientChange: There isn't enough change in their shared neighbors to animate yet.
pair.noPath: No path connects these two entities.
